context: Tests whether the response implements a correct type-safe generic groupBy function in TypeScript.

checklist.name: Correct generic signature
checklist.description: Function signature uses generics with K extends keyof T constraint to restrict the key parameter

checklist.name: Correct grouping logic
checklist.description: Implementation correctly groups items into a Record/object where each key maps to an array of matching items

checklist.name: Handles key value to string conversion
checklist.description: Converts the key's value to a string for use as Record key (via String() or template literal)

checklist.name: Includes usage example
checklist.description: Shows example usage with the specified type and demonstrates that invalid keys cause compile errors

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: TypeScript code compiles correctly with strict mode and generic constraints are properly applied
